common.numericThrottleInputHint: Only digits (0–9). Letters and symbols are ignored. Allowed ranges are checked when you save.
common.numericThrottleDailyCapInvalid: Daily cap: enter a whole number from 1 to 2000.
common.numericThrottleDelayMinInvalid: Min gap: enter a whole number from 1 to 1440 (minutes).
common.numericThrottleDelayMaxInvalid: Max gap: enter a whole number from 1 to 1440 (minutes).

emailHistory.title: Email activity
emailHistory.description: Timeline for {email}: outbound sends and inbound replies.

login.title: AI SDR Agent
login.subtitle: Sign in to your single-tenant admin panel.
login.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check the API and network.

leadsPage.title: Contact database
leadsPage.subtitle: Add leads via CSV or the Maps parser, then assign them to campaigns for outreach.
leadsPage.csvDialogDescription: Columns: email (required); optional company, pain_point, website (headers website, url, link, or website_url). Separator: comma or semicolon. Duplicate emails are skipped.
leadsPage.parserDialogDescription: Search runs in the background; leads with a found email are added to the pool without a campaign.
leadsPage.parserPollingHint: The parser runs on the server until it finishes (often about 1–3 minutes). This overlay closes automatically when the run completes; you can also close it below and keep working — the job keeps running on the server.
leadsPage.parserPollingDismissed: You closed the wait screen. The parser may still be running on the server — refresh the table later if you expect new contacts.
leadsPage.parserDoneZero: Parsing finished: no new contacts were saved (often no public email was found on company sites).
leadsPage.parserPollingTimeout: Waiting timed out. The list was refreshed — check logs or try again.
leadsPage.parserAlreadyRunning: A parser run is already in progress. Wait until it finishes.
leadsPage.assignDialogDescription: Selected leads will be linked to this campaign for the outreach worker. Only if the campaign is Active: it switches to Paused so new contacts are not emailed until you press Play on the campaigns page. Draft and Paused campaigns keep their status.
leadsPage.loadTimeout: Request timed out. Is the API running at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL?
leadsPage.empty: No leads yet. Import CSV or run the parser.
leadsPage.filterEmpty: No contacts match these filters. Adjust statuses or email search.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Prompts and rules for outreach to leads.
campaigns.listDescription: Use Edit to change prompts and limits; Play/Pause controls outreach.
campaigns.editAria: Edit campaign — prompts, limits, and leads
campaigns.playAria: Start sending — set campaign to Active
campaigns.pauseAria: Pause sending — set campaign to Paused
campaigns.confirmDeleteCampaign: Delete "{name}"? Leads will stay in the pool unassigned from this campaign.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet. Create the first one.

campaignNew.title: New campaign
campaignNew.cardDescription: System prompt and rules for the first email and follow-ups.
campaignNew.name: Name
campaignNew.throttleIntro: Sending cadence (helps reduce bulk-send spam signals): daily cap uses UTC midnight–midnight; after each successful send the worker waits a random time between min and max.
campaignNew.delayOrderError: Min gap must be less than or equal to max gap.

campaignDetail.editDescription: Prompts and campaign status affect future email generation.
campaignDetail.name: Name
campaignDetail.followUpRulesHint: When a lead replies, the inbox worker uses these rules together with the thread to classify the reply and suggest next steps (shown as an AI note on inbound messages).
campaignDetail.loadTimeout: Request timed out. Is the API running at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL?
campaignDetail.leadsDescription: Leads linked to this campaign. Add or import contacts from the Contacts page.
campaignDetail.leadsEmpty: No leads assigned yet. Pick contacts on the Contacts page and assign them here.
campaignDetail.throttleIntro: Sending cadence (helps reduce bulk-send spam signals): daily cap uses UTC midnight–midnight; after each successful send the worker waits a random time between min and max.
campaignDetail.delayOrderError: Min gap must be less than or equal to max gap.
